deviations.description: The process model on page 1 allows issuing a SIM card to customers with outstanding debt less than 100 €, but the updated requirement prohibits issuing a new SIM card to customers with outstanding debt exceeding 50 €. This results in a violation, as the process permits issuing new SIM cards to customers with debt between 50.01 € and 100 €, which is now prohibited.

The change from 'issue SIM card' to 'issue new SIM card' in the requirement does not affect compliance, as the process model activity is labeled 'Activate SIM card' and 'Send SIM card', which both refer to the issuance of a new SIM card. There is no distinction in the process model between issuing a SIM card and issuing a new SIM card.
process_model_reference: issue SIM card / issue new SIM card
